toolSpec.name: analyze_cdk_project
toolSpec.description: Analyze a CDK project to identify AWS services used. This tool dynamically extracts service information from CDK constructs without relying on hardcoded service mappings.

toolSpec.name: analyze_terraform_project
toolSpec.description: Analyze a Terraform project to identify AWS services used. This tool dynamically extracts service information from Terraform resource declarations.

region.description: AWS region(s) - single region string (e.g., "us-east-1") or list for multi-region comparison (e.g., ["us-east-1", "us-west-2", "eu-west-1"]). Optional: omit for global services like DataTransfer or CloudFront that don't have region-specific pricing.

filters.description: Optional list of filters to apply to the pricing query

max_allowed_characters.description: Maximum response length in characters (default: 100,000, use -1 for unlimited)

output_options.description: Optional output filtering options to reduce response size. Use {"pricing_terms": ["OnDemand", "FlatRate"]} to significantly reduce response size for large services like EC2.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (default: 100, max: 100)

next_token.description: Pagination token from previous response to get next page of results

toolSpec.name: get_bedrock_patterns
toolSpec.description: Get architecture patterns for Amazon Bedrock applications, including component relationships and cost considerations

toolSpec.name: generate_cost_report
toolSpec.description: Generate a detailed cost analysis report based on pricing data for one or more AWS services.

pricing_data.description: Raw pricing data from AWS pricing tools

assumptions.description: List of assumptions for cost analysis

exclusions.description: List of items excluded from cost analysis

output_file.description: Path to save the report file

detailed_cost_data.description: Detailed cost information for complex scenarios

recommendations.description: Direct recommendations or guidance for generation

toolSpec.name: get_pricing_service_codes
toolSpec.description: Get AWS service codes available in the Price List API.

filter.description: Optional case-insensitive regex pattern to filter service codes

toolSpec.name: get_pricing_service_attributes
toolSpec.description: Get filterable attributes available for an AWS service in the Pricing API.

filter.description: Optional case-insensitive regex pattern to filter service attribute names

toolSpec.name: get_pricing_attribute_values
toolSpec.description: Get valid values for pricing filter attributes.

filters.description: Optional dictionary mapping attribute names to regex patterns for filtering their values (e.g., {"instanceType": "t3", "operatingSystem": "Linux"})

toolSpec.name: get_price_list_urls
toolSpec.description: Get download URLs for bulk pricing data files.

effective_date.description: Effective date for pricing in format "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM" (default: current timestamp)
